title: MR.SIGA Soap Dispensing Dish Brush, Kitchen Brush for Pot Pan Sink Cleaning, Black
features: DURABLE & LONG LASTING: MR.SIGA dish brush with soap dispenser is built with sturdy body construction, non scratch and odorless nylon bristles, they are durable enough to scrub dirt effectively yet gentle enough to be used on non stick cookware. Built in scraper on brush head backside easily removes stuck-on food.

COMFORTABLE GRIP: Designed with a non-slip and ergonomic handle which fits comfortably in hand even when wet and soapy. The handle can be easily filled with your favorite dish soap for 70 ml. To start cleaning, simply press the button and it will squirt dish soap directly.

WIDE RANGE OF USE: MR.SIGA soap dispensing scrub brush is made to last, bristles are fimly built on brush head and will not leave fuzz behind after cleaning. It's definitely a perfect kitchen brush for cleaning dishes, countertop, sinks, cookware and more.

REPLACEABLE DISH BRUSH HEAD: The soap dispensing scrub brush head can be easily replaced with a new brush head. Please refer to ASIN B09G1726XX for ordering replacement brush refills. MR.SIGA suggests replacing brush head every 3 months.
MR.SIGA's mission: Make your housework easier, and make the world cleaner. Please do not hesitate to contact us with any questions you may have, we are here for support and advice!
description: Product Description MR.SIGA Soap Dispensing Dish Brush One-handed operation to spray Built-in Scraper Built in scraper on brush head backside easily removes stuck-on food.
